text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 6 

CONTRACT_ID 

LABEL: Part D Contract Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the Medicare Part D contract number for the beneficiary’s Part D plan. 

CMS assigns an identifier to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

FILE(S): Part D Beneficiary Plan Election file 

VALUES: XXXXX
